news.t: Tech Shift Fuels Double-Digit ETF Gains

holdings.infoBox: DTEC is an equity ETF with a total of 98 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nebius Group stock at 2.50%, Fortinet at 1.83%, Palo Alto Networks at 1.80%, Datadog at 1.72%, and Allegro MicroSystems at 1.67%.

overview.description: The ALPS Disruptive Technologies ETF (DTEC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Disruptive Technologies index. The fund tracks an index of 100 global companies that are involved in disruptive technologies across 10 themes. DTEC was launched on Dec 29, 2017 and is issued by SS&C.

data.title: Tech Shift Fuels Double-Digit ETF Gains
data.text: Three ALPS ETFs each gained more than 10% in May as investors shifted money into technology and away from traditional energy. Key Takeaways: ACES gained 19.4% last month and is up 72.5% over the past ...
